sections.paragraph: , once found, Lam 1:14 in Niphal. According to the Hebrew interpreters, to be bound, tied to (used of a yoke). The verbs עָקַד, אָבַד, appear to be cognates, the aspirates being related to the sibilants, see שׂ p. 782 . The Targ. has made heavy. Several MSS. have נשׁקד, which is expressed by the LXX., Vulg., Syr., but it is contrary to the sense.
